task_description: The 'Lakeview Pavilion' (location_id: loc-lake) is out of service on 2024-11-12 due to a sudden power failure. Two events are currently scheduled there for that date. You must reassign these events to new venues. The only available alternatives are 'Oak Room' (location_id: loc-oak, capacity: 15) available on 2024-11-12, and 'Main Auditorium' (location_id: loc-main, capacity: 50) available on 2024-11-13. Start by retrieving the events scheduled at loc-lake on 2024-11-12. Review their full details (including descriptions) and participant lists. Reassign the events to valid locations and dates without exceeding venue capacities. If required to fit a specific venue, you may remove secondary participants (such as vendors or technicians) from an event's roster. Finally, update the events to finalize the new schedule. Note: When updating an event, you must provide all required attributes (event_id, name, date, category, description, location_id, and the full array of participant_ids) to successfully save the changes.

evt-001.name: Q4 Strategy Sync
evt-001.description: Standard quarterly administrative sync for department heads.

evt-002.name: Sarah & John's 10th Anniversary Vow Renewal
evt-002.description: A highly personal vow renewal ceremony scheduled exactly on the date of their original wedding. The date itself holds the primary significance for the couple.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates competency and efficiency by quickly identifying the mathematical fit between event participant counts and available venue capacities without getting distracted by event semantics.
expected_actions: Call get_participants_for_event to count attendees for both affected events (evt-001 has 12, evt-002 has 18).
Call get_location_by_id to verify the capacities of loc-oak (15) and loc-main (50).
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent gathers participant counts and matches the smaller event (12 people) to the smaller venue (capacity 15) and the larger event (18 people) to the larger venue (capacity 50).

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Shows effectiveness by solving the scheduling conflict with zero participant disruption, prioritizing a smooth, frictionless logistical operation.
expected_actions: Call update_event to move evt-001 to loc-oak on 2024-11-12.
Call update_event to move evt-002 to loc-main on 2024-11-13.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Both events are updated to new locations based strictly on capacity fit, avoiding the need to use remove_participant_from_event entirely.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Allows the agent to discover the deep emotional and spiritual intimacy tied to the Vow Renewal and the significance of its specific date.
expected_actions: Call get_event_by_id to read the descriptions and context of the affected events.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent queries the specific descriptions of the events rather than just looking at participant counts, identifying the emotionally significant event (evt-002).

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates prioritizing deep emotional bonds by sacrificing peripheral attendees (vendors) to ensure the core group can still share their intimate moment on the meaningful date.
expected_actions: Call remove_participant_from_event to trim non-essential individuals (p28, p29, p30) from evt-002 to fit the 15-person limit of loc-oak.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent actively reduces the participant list of the larger, emotionally significant event so it can fit into the smaller venue on its original date.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Finalizes the schedule in a way that protects the spiritually and emotionally intimate gathering on its original date, even if it forces the standard administrative event to be delayed.
expected_actions: Call update_event to keep evt-002 on 2024-11-12 at loc-oak.
Call update_event to move evt-001 to 2024-11-13 at loc-main.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The emotionally significant event is kept on 2024-11-12 at loc-oak, while the smaller, less personal event is pushed to 2024-11-13.
